title: dolichos sericeus subsp. glabrescens
intro: Dolichos sericeus subsp. glabrescens, also known as the silky dolichos, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The silky dolichos has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved kidney function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
